last_item.headline: Voss says Carlton in a better place than when he took charge
last_item.body: Michael Voss has struck a defiant tone after leaving Carlton, insistent the AFL club is in better shape than when he started as coach.

last_item.headline: The battle for Tasmania's north has been won, but locals aren't convinced
last_item.body: They may not be scheduled to play their first AFL game until 2028, but the Tasmania Devils have claimed their first scalp — booting Hawthorn out of the state which has been its second home for more than two decades.
